title: Creamy Canadian Mac and Cheese
description: A rich and comforting Canadian-inspired macaroni and cheese dish made with a creamy fromage blanc sauce.
instructions: 2. Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
4. Add the flour and whisk to create a roux, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
5. Slowly pour in the milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
6. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until it thickens.
7. Remove the sauce from the heat and stir in the fromage blanc until melted and smooth.
8. Add the grated cheddar cheese and stir until melted and well combined.
9. Add the cooked macaroni to the cheese sauce and stir until well coated.
10. Transfer the macaroni mixture to a baking dish and top with additional grated cheddar cheese if desired.
11. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, until golden brown and bubbly.
